title: Brand General Manager (Swiss Timepiece/Retail & Wholesale)
description:
Job Summary

Drive retail account growth and distribution for a Swiss Watch Brand across Asia by managing partner relationships, executing commercial directives, and representing the brand at key industry events.

Responsibilities

  • Develop and maintain retail accounts across Asia to expand market presence and increase sales
  • Build and sustain strong relationships with retail partners through regular follow-up meetings and ongoing communication to ensure alignment with brand expectations
  • Monitor and control the distribution network by enforcing commercial directives including pricing, discount policies, stock inventories, and sales forecasts
  • Conduct regular travel to retail locations to support sales activities and strengthen partner engagement
  • Represent the brand at meetings and exhibitions in Switzerland to promote products and gather market insights
  • Collaborate independently with internal and external stakeholders to drive distribution and brand visibility in the luxury timepiece segment

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • Direct experience in sales and marketing of luxury timepieces, jewelry, or sports-related products, with preference for candidates experienced in retail distribution and brand management
  • Strong understanding of local and regional retail partners and networks within Asia
  • Enthusiastic and sociable personality with the ability to work autonomously
  • Passion for watches and sports, with candidates involved in global sports communities considered an advantage
  • Availability to start on short notice is advantageous

Other Information

  • EA License: 90C3627
  • EA Reg No: R1108020

Interested candidates are invited to send their updated resume (in MS Word format) to theresa@personnellink.com.sg. Please include reasons for leaving previous employment, current/expected salary package, and specify the position applied for in the email subject. All applications will be treated with strict confidentiality. Only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

postedCompany.description:
As a leading Recruitment consultancy in Singapore with about two decades of experience, Personnel Link JobHub has created a niche for itself in successfully providing manpower services such as Executives searches, Temporary, Permanent and overseas placements to global companies and SMEs.

Personnel Link JobHub seeks to help organisations yield the maximum benefits on their recruiting investments. This is accomplished with the dedication of a pool of committed recruitment consultants who come from various backgrounds, equipped with their own set of expertise in the respective industries
